positive: A minimalist vector illustration of a stylized crescent moon and a geometric forest of abstract trees. The design should utilize a limited, high-contrast color palette of deep midnight blue, vibrant gold, and crisp matte white. The trees are composed of sharp, interconnected geometric shapes (triangles, trapezoids) that create a sense of depth and rhythm, forming a forest silhouette. The moon should be a clean, polished semicircle overlapping the top branch of the composition. The overall composition must be perfectly centered and designed with clean, thick outlines suitable for screen printing on apparel. Aspect ratio is square. Studio lighting, clean lines, maximal contrast, graphic design style.
